name: Catfish Frangelico
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a saute pan on medium high heat and add cooking oil.
2. Dip catfish fillets in egg wash and then into white flour.
3. Saute the fillets in hot oil until nicely browned (3-5 minutes). Reserve the fillets to warm the pan for holding.
4. Saute pecans in remaining oil for about 1 minute.
5. Deglaze the pan with Frangelico liquor.
6. Add white wine and lemon juice. Bring to a boil.
7. Add heavy cream and return to a boil, reducing by half. Season to taste with salt and cayenne pepper.
8. Add butter and swirl the pan slowly over the burner until all butter is incorporated. Do not boil after adding butter.
9. Place 1 catfish fillet on each of four plates and spoon about ¼ of sauce over each fillet.
Yield: 4 servings.
